_doc: Open loops = anything parked, waiting, or ready-but-not-applied. The single source of truth so nothing falls on the ground. open-loops.py surfaces every open entry at SessionStart. To close one, set status to 'closed' (or delete it). NEVER prose-defer in a ledger; add it here instead.

loops.title: cc-spex closeout-gate PR
loops.next_action: Check github.com/rhuss/cc-spex/issues/9. If the maintainer replied yes/just-send-it: fork rhuss/cc-spex, push branch chore/closeout-gate, open the PR. Commands + body in q-system/output/cc-spex-pr-drafts-2026-06-16.md. (gh runs in your terminal, not the agent sandbox.)

loops.title: capability-token PR to dwarvesf/claude-guardrails
loops.next_action: Built + 12/12 tests pass, never filed. Run STEP 1 (one gh issue create) from q-system/output/captoken-pr-drafts-2026-06-16.md in your terminal, paste the issue URL back. PR after a maintainer thumbs-up.

loops.title: kipi-investigations H14/H15 lives on branch feat/skill-hook-enforcement
loops.next_action: H14/H15 (Obsidian Bases + callouts, commit 387f3643) is committed on feat/skill-hook-enforcement and verified end-to-end (241 entities, .base + callouts render). It reaches main when that branch merges. If you abandon that branch, the work dies with it -> git cherry-pick 387f3643 onto main or a fresh branch to save it. Set this loop to closed once the branch merges or you've cherry-picked.
